title: A Fabumouse Vacation for Geronimo
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo just wants a cool, quiet vacation, but one disaster after another keeps him stuck at work — until he finally ends up at the silly Ratty Tatty Hotel with his noisy assistant Pinky! 🏖️

options.en: A chef who owns a cheese restaurant.
options.zh: 一家奶酪餐厅的老板兼厨师。

options.en: The author and publisher of The Rodent's Gazette newspaper.
options.zh: 《鼠民公报》的作家兼出版人。

options.en: Geronimo's noisy young assistant.
options.zh: 杰罗尼摩那个吵闹的年轻助手。

options.en: The president of the Central Snob Academy. according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 势利中央学院的主席。（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Geronimo says he is an author and publisher who runs The Rodent's Gazette, the most popular newspaper on Mouse Island.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩在书中说自己是一名作家兼出版人，经营着老鼠岛上最受欢迎的报纸《鼠民公报》。

q.en: Why does Geronimo desperately want a vacation at the beginning of the book?
q.zh: 故事开头，杰罗尼摩为什么迫切想要去度假？

options.en: A terrible heat wave makes New Mouse City unbearably hot.
options.zh: 一场可怕的热浪让新老鼠城热得让人受不了。

options.en: He wins a free trip to Egypt.
options.zh: 他赢了一张去埃及的免费机票。

options.en: His newspaper goes out of business.
options.zh: 他办的报纸停刊了。

options.en: A big snowstorm traps him inside his office. according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一场大暴雪把他困在了办公室里。（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book opens with a scorching August in New Mouse City; the air is so heavy and hot that Geronimo can barely breathe and longs for vacation.
explain.zh: 故事一开始，新老鼠城正值酷热的八月，空气又沉又烫，杰罗尼摩几乎喘不过气，因此万分渴望去度假。

q.en: What is Pinky Pick's job at the newspaper, and what did she create?
q.zh: 平基·皮克在报社担任什么职务，她又创办了什么？

options.en: She is the head chef at the newspaper café.
options.zh: 她是报社咖啡馆的主厨。

options.en: She is the travel agent who books Geronimo's trips. according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 她是帮杰罗尼摩订行程的旅行代理人。（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: She is Geronimo's sister and runs the sports page.
options.zh: 她是杰罗尼摩的妹妹，负责体育版。

options.en: She is the assistant editor and created Fur Kids Only magazine.
options.zh: 她是助理编辑，并创办了《皮毛儿童》杂志。

explain.en: Pinky is Geronimo's very young assistant editor, and last year she invented a hit magazine for young mice called Fur Kids Only.
explain.zh: 平基是杰罗尼摩非常年轻的助理编辑，去年她创办了一本深受小老鼠欢迎的杂志，名叫《皮毛儿童》。

q.en: What award does Sir Ratley von Snotfur III take away from Geronimo?
q.zh: 冯·斯诺特弗爵士从杰罗尼摩手中收回了什么奖项？

options.en: A gold medal for the biggest cheese collection.
options.zh: 收藏奶酪最多金奖章。

options.en: The Best Cook on Mouse Island trophy.
options.zh: 老鼠岛最佳厨师奖杯。

options.en: The Most Polished Mouse of the Year medal.
options.zh: 年度最优雅老鼠奖章。

options.en: The Funniest Singer of the Year award.
options.zh: 年度最搞笑歌手奖。

explain.en: Sir Ratley arrives to name Geronimo 'Most Polished Mouse of the Year' but, after catching him in a silly outfit, rips the medal away in disgust.
explain.zh: 拉特利爵士本要授予杰罗尼摩“年度最优雅老鼠”称号，但看到他滑稽的打扮后，厌恶地收回了奖章。

q.en: What is the name and nickname of Geronimo's grandfather, who founded the newspaper?
q.zh: 创办报社的杰罗尼摩的祖父叫什么名字，外号是什么？

options.en: William Shortpaws, also known as Cheap Mouse Willy.
options.zh: 威廉·短爪，外号“小气鬼威利”。

options.en: Trap Stilton, also known as the Master Chef.
options.zh: 特拉普·斯蒂顿，外号“大厨”。

options.en: Benjamin Talltail, also known as Big Cheese Ben. according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 本杰明·长尾，外号“大奶酪本”。（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Sir Ratley, also known as the Snob King.
options.zh: 拉特利爵士，外号“势利国王”。

explain.en: Geronimo's grandfather is William Shortpaws, founder of The Rodent's Gazette, nicknamed Cheap Mouse Willy because he was the cheapest mouse around.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩的祖父是威廉·短爪，《鼠民公报》的创办人，因为出了名的小气而被叫做“小气鬼威利”。

q.en: Who fixes the broken printing press, and what is his secret trick?
q.zh: 是谁修好了坏掉的印刷机，他的秘密方法又是什么？

options.en: Terry Techrat, who replaces it with a new machine. according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 特里·泰克拉特，他换了一台新机器。（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Trap, who cooks a meal for it.
options.zh: 特拉普，它给它做了一顿饭。

options.en: Furdrick Fixit, who fixes it by giving it a good kick.
options.zh: 弗德里克·菲克西特，他的办法就是用力踢它一脚。

options.en: Pinky Pick, who sings a song to it.
options.zh: 平基·皮克，她对它唱了一首歌。

explain.en: Retired technician Furdrick Fixit fixes the old RAT-PRINT 500 by giving it a swift kick, and the press starts printing again.
explain.zh: 退休技师弗德里克·菲克西特对着老旧的“鼠印500”号印刷机用力踢了一脚，机器便重新印出了报纸。

q.en: Before ending up at the Ratty Tatty Hotel, how many vacation trips does Geronimo miss?
q.zh: 在最后来到破旧旅馆之前，杰罗尼摩一共错过了几次度假行程？

options.en: Two trips to his grandfather's house.
options.zh: 两次去祖父家的行程。

options.en: Four trips (Happy Tail Island, Coldcreeps Peak, Fossil Forest, and Egypt).
options.zh: 四次（快乐尾巴岛、寒颤峰、化石森林和埃及）。

options.en: One trip to the Swiss Cheese Islands.
options.zh: 一次去瑞士奶酪岛的行程。

options.en: None — the Ratty Tatty was his first choice. according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一次都没有——破旧旅馆本来就是他的第一选择。（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Geronimo misses four planned trips (Happy Tail Island, Coldcreeps Peak, Fossil Forest, and Egypt) before the travel agent books him into the Ratty Tatty; she even scolds him for canceling 4 trips.
explain.zh: 在旅行社把他安排进破旧旅馆前，杰罗尼摩先后错过了四次行程（快乐尾巴岛、寒颤峰、化石森林和埃及）；代理人还数落他已经取消了四趟旅行。

q.en: Why does Geronimo miss his trip to Egypt?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩为什么会错过去埃及的旅行？

options.en: Cousin Trap's fried mussels and spicy food make him very sick.
options.zh: 表哥特拉普做的炸贻贝和辛辣料理让他病得很重。

options.en: He loses his plane ticket at the bus station.
options.zh: 他在汽车站弄丢了机票。

options.en: The travel agency cancels all flights to Egypt. according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 旅行社取消了所有飞往埃及的航班。（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A fire breaks out in his office.
options.zh: 他的办公室起了火。

explain.en: Cousin Trap serves fried mussels, clam soup, and an extra-hot chili oyster pie; Geronimo wakes up with a terrible stomachache and the doctor orders him to bed for days.
explain.zh: 表哥特拉普端出了炸贻贝、蛤蜊汤和特辣牡蛎派，结果杰罗尼摩半夜肚子剧痛，医生让他卧床好几天，埃及之行因此泡汤。

q.en: Where is the Ratty Tatty Hotel, and how is it rated?
q.zh: 破旧旅馆位于哪里，评级又如何？

options.en: In New Mouse City downtown, rated four cheese triangles.
options.zh: 在新老鼠城市中心，评级是四块奶酪三角。

options.en: In Catstinko, Furball City, rated half a cheese triangle (a reeking rat's nest).
options.zh: 在毛球城的猫臭镇，评级是半块奶酪三角（臭气熏天的鼠窝）。

options.en: On the sunny Happy Tail Island, rated five cheese triangles. according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 在阳光明媚的快乐尾巴岛，评级是五块奶酪三角。（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: At the top of Coldcreeps Peak, rated three cheese triangles.
options.zh: 在寒颤峰山顶，评级是三块奶酪三角。

explain.en: The travel ad lists the Ratty Tatty Hotel in Catstinko, Furball City, as a 'Half a cheese triangle' — described as a reeking rat's nest.
explain.zh: 旅行社的广告写明，破旧旅馆位于毛球城的猫臭镇，评级只有“半块奶酪三角”，被形容为臭气熏天的鼠窝。

q.en: What disgusting food is served to Geronimo at the Ratty Tatty Hotel?
q.zh: 在破旧旅馆里，端给杰罗尼摩的恶心食物是什么？

options.en: Fresh fried mussels with extra-hot chili. according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 新鲜的炸贻贝配特辣辣椒。（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A vitamin-packed mozzarella milk shake.
options.zh: 营养丰富的莫扎里拉奶酪奶昔。

options.en: Cheddar biscuits and Swiss cheese.
options.zh: 切达饼干和瑞士奶酪。

options.en: Peanut butter and June bugs with moldy mozzarella.
options.zh: 花生酱和六月虫拌发霉的莫扎里拉奶酪。

explain.en: The hotel's owner Freddy Fleafur serves Geronimo a sandwich of peanut butter and June bugs with moldy mozzarella, which makes Geronimo want to go home.
explain.zh: 旅馆老板弗雷迪·弗利弗给杰罗尼摩端上“花生酱和六月虫拌发霉莫扎里拉奶酪”的三明治，把他恶心得只想回家。
